# Reference Comparison

Reference equality comparison

```perl
$same_ref = $ref1 == $ref2;
```

## Expected Compilation Outcomes

### Clean Perl Output

```perl
$same_ref = $ref1 == $ref2;
```

### Typed Perl Output

```perl
$same_ref = $ref1 == $ref2;
```
